critical_issues: Model predicts near-zero phi for most styles, but wildly wrong (1M+) for tower/cantilever
Root cause: phi was NOT scaled in S3 training, while stress and disp were scaled. This caused the model to ignore large-phi geometries.
OOD benchmark reports raw MAE; predictions are scaled but targets are raw, making numbers look catastrophic
improvements_over_iter_1: S3 loss completely stabilized after removing physics_residual_loss and uncertainty weighting
S1 simple MSE warm-up is robust (0.01 loss)
S2 PFSF distillation converges cleanly to 0.03

next_action: Add phi_scale to S3 FEM fine-tuning (same as stress_scale and disp_scale)
Reduce consistency loss weight from 0.5 to 0.1 to prevent it from dominating
Scale up model to hidden=48, modes=8 for iteration 3
Fix OOD benchmark to report normalized MAE
